context: The solution must extract every cross-reference to a clause number from a legal contract, covering both common patterns like 'clause X' and extended patterns like 'pursuant to' or 'in accordance with'. For Word documents, extraction must use regex across all paragraphs and runs rather than manual reading.

checklist.name: Extended pattern recognition
checklist.description: Recognizes 'in accordance with', 'pursuant to', 'as set out in', 'referred to in' patterns

checklist.name: Programmatic extraction for .docx
checklist.description: Uses regex across all paragraphs/runs in Word files

checklist.name: No false omissions
checklist.description: Does not miss cross-references present in the document
